subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Wouldst thou remain silent this day, or arise to summon the servants and apprise them of that which hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی هل ینبغی ان تکون الیوم صامتا او تقوم و تنادی العباد و تخبرهم بما فعل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God
